nasb.text: So he shall look at the mark, and if the mark on the walls of the house has greenish or reddish depressions and appears deeper than the surface,

esv.text: And he shall examine the disease. And if the disease is in the walls of the house with greenish or reddish spots, and if it appears to be deeper than the surface,

cnv.text: 他要察看那病症，如果發現在房屋的牆上有發綠或是發紅的腐蝕斑紋，而且有深透入牆的現象；

ccb.text: 如发现墙壁上出现红色或绿色霉斑，并且侵入墙中，
